tests.name: Full diagnostic sequence on a degraded system
tests.notes: The three-command Phase 1 sequence is followed correctly most of the time. Main failure: skipping rex memory-check and jumping to repair. Phase 4 re-verification is skipped ~20% of the time.

tests.name: Specific known gotcha — embed count zero
tests.notes: The sqlite-vec gotcha is only reliably caught when the skill's table is in context. Without it, models tend to suggest re-ingesting. Destructive-first responses drop to ~5% with the skill active.

tests.name: Ingest lock file investigation
tests.notes: The lsof-before-delete rule is the key encoded preference here. Models respect it ~80% of the time when the skill is active. Without the skill, lock deletion without lsof happens ~60% of the time.
